title: Halloween Decorations Spider Web,100G Spider Web Cobweb and 20pcs Spider Bats for Indoor Outdoor Scary Spider Web Haunted House Party Halloween Yard Decoration Supplies
features: 【Must Choice for Halloween Decoration】Package includes 100g Halloween stretch spider web & 20 pcs vivid spiders. This set is "MUST Choice" for Halloween Parties, Bars decorations and trick or treats events, which can add spooky atmosphere and make any place look scary

【100g Halloween Cobwebs】Made of 100g artificial cotton, Vast stretchable web is enough to cover 1000 Sqft of your house indoor & outdoor ,the halloween home decor,easy to stretch and attach on objects anywhere you like.

【Come with 20 Pieces Spiders】Vivid and lifelike novelty Spiders can be decorated with cobweb, hide in bags or books, put on cake or pumpkin, spread on desk or floor etc. Anywhere you can think of, spiders can be there to entertainment everyone

【Most Eye-catching Halloween Abandoned House Decoration】stretch web decorations can be mounted just about anywhere you could think of- on the roof, on spooky spider web, on gates, porch, door, window, even with Halloween tombstones & cemetery decorations, giving the neighborhood a spine-chilling Halloween look that will make them the envy in this Halloween.

【Perfect Memory For Halloween】 All your party guest will feel scared and spooky with this spider and cobweb decorations. It is also a good gift idea for your love one's to enjoy such events and memorize a perfect Halloween
